scripts.logs:
node -e "const fs = require('fs'); console.log('=== SEARCH LOGS ===
' + (fs.existsSync('./logs/search_queries.txt') ? fs.readFileSync('./logs/search_queries.txt', 'utf8') : 'No logs') + '

=== VISITED SITES ===
' + (fs.existsSync('./logs/visited_sites.txt') ? fs.readFileSync('./logs/visited_sites.txt', 'utf8') : 'No logs'));"
